name: Value Convergence Holdings Limited
summary: Value Convergence Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial services in Hong Kong. It operates through five segments: Brokerage and Financing, Corporate Finance and Other Advisory, Asset Management, Insurance Brokerage, and Proprietary Trading. The company offers securities, as well as futures and options brokering and dealing; and margin financing and money lending; placing and underwriting;, as well as trades in equity and debt securities, futures, options, derivatives, and structured products. It also provides mergers and acquisitions, research, insurance brokerage, asset management, financial advisory, and company secretarial services. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
